## Conceitos-Chave de Cole Gordon

### Frameworks Principais
- **7 Beliefs Framework** - 6 beliefs no Discovery, 1 no Pitch
- **6-Phase Call Flow** - Estrutura completa de call
- **4 Pillars Pitch** - Paradigm Shift + Future Pacing
- **3 Buckets de Objeções** - Uncertainty, Support, Financial
- **Fringe Deals** - 60-80% do pipeline

### Filosofia Central
> "If you have the right philosophy, the tactics and scripts come naturally."

### Métricas-Chave
- Show Rate target: 80%+
- 3 OFFERS por closer por dia
- Manager Callback: 75-80% close rate
